page_content:
University of the Punjab Examination Regulations 2021.
1. Attendance requirement: students must maintain seventy five percent attendance in each course during the semester to remain eligible to sit in the final examination for that course.
2. Probation policy: a student whose cumulative grade point average falls below the prescribed minimum threshold shall be placed on academic probation for the following semester.

3. Re-admission after probation: a student on probation who fails to raise the cumulative grade point average above the threshold within one semester shall be subject to withdrawal from the program.
Regulation No. 4 Migration policy: students seeking migration from one affiliated college to another must submit a migration application within thirty days from the start of the semester.
ANNUAL EXAMINATION SCHEDULE
5. Examination fee: candidates must deposit the prescribed examination fee before the announced deadline to be considered a valid candidate for the annual examination.
